report_name: Montreal-Area High School Accidentally Leaks Social Insurance Numbers of Over 1,000 Parents in Email Blunder

identities.name: Sir Wilfrid Laurier School Board
identities.description: The school board in Montreal, Canada, responsible for the data breach caused by human error at one of its high schools.

identities.name: Rosemere High School
identities.description: The high school where an employee inadvertently sent an email with a spreadsheet containing the personal information of over 1,000 parents.

identities.name: Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec
identities.description: Quebec's privacy watchdog to which the data breach incident was reported.

identities.name: Parents of Rosemere High School students
identities.description: A group of over 1,000 parents whose sensitive personal information, including names, dates of birth, and Social Insurance Numbers (SINs), was leaked in an email.

relationships.source_name: Commission d'accès à l'information du Québec

relationships.target_name: Parents of Rosemere High School students
